curation_notes: The patch adds a sync.RWMutex to the OAuth2Handler struct and wraps all accesses to the shared registeredStates map with appropriate Lock/Unlock or RLock/RUnlock calls. Only one source file was modified (restapi_auth_oauth2.go). The sibling file (restapi_auth_oauth2_providers.go) does not access the registeredStates map. The pre-assigned vulnerability class race-condition is correct — CWE-362, CWE-400, and CWE-662 all align with concurrent unsynchronized map access causing a Go runtime panic.
